import Mathlib.LinearAlgebra.TensorProduct.Map
import Mathlib.LinearAlgebra.TensorProduct.Associator
import Mathlib.Algebra.Category.ModuleCat.Presheaf.Sheafification
import Mathlib.CategoryTheory.Limits.Shapes.Equalizers
open TensorProduct CategoryTheory Limits
variable (S : Type) [CommRing S] (M N : Type)
  [AddCommGroup M] [Module S M] [AddCommGroup N] [Module S N]
noncomputable def actN : (S ⊗[ℤ] N) →ₗ[ℤ] N :=
  TensorProduct.lift (LinearMap.mk₂ ℤ (fun s n => s • n)
    (fun s1 s2 n => add_smul s1 s2 n) (fun c s n => smul_assoc c s n)
    (fun s n1 n2 => smul_add s n1 n2) (fun c s n => smul_comm s c n))
noncomputable def actM : (M ⊗[ℤ] S) →ₗ[ℤ] M :=
  TensorProduct.lift (LinearMap.mk₂ ℤ (fun m s => s • m)
    (fun m1 m2 s => smul_add s m1 m2) (fun c m s => smul_comm s c m)
    (fun m s1 s2 => add_smul s1 s2 m) (fun c m s => smul_assoc c s m))
noncomputable def actRmap : (M ⊗[ℤ] (S ⊗[ℤ] N)) →ₗ[ℤ] (M ⊗[ℤ] N) := TensorProduct.map LinearMap.id (actN S N)
noncomputable def actLmap : (M ⊗[ℤ] (S ⊗[ℤ] N)) →ₗ[ℤ] (M ⊗[ℤ] N) :=
  (TensorProduct.map (actM S M) LinearMap.id).comp (TensorProduct.assoc ℤ M S N).symm.toLinearMap
@[simp] lemma actRmap_tmul (m : M) (s : S) (n : N) : actRmap S M N (m ⊗ₜ (s ⊗ₜ n)) = m ⊗ₜ (s • n) := rfl
@[simp] lemma actLmap_tmul (m : M) (s : S) (n : N) : actLmap S M N (m ⊗ₜ (s ⊗ₜ n)) = (s • m) ⊗ₜ n := rfl
noncomputable def projL : (M ⊗[ℤ] N) →ₗ[ℤ] (M ⊗[S] N) :=
  (TensorProduct.liftAddHom
    { toFun := fun m => (LinearMap.toAddMonoidHom (((TensorProduct.mk S M N) m).restrictScalars ℤ))
      map_zero' := by ext n; simp
      map_add' := fun m1 m2 => by ext n; simp [TensorProduct.add_tmul] }
    (fun r m n => by simp [TensorProduct.smul_tmul])).toIntLinearMap
@[simp] lemma projL_tmul (m : M) (n : N) : projL S M N (m ⊗ₜ n) = m ⊗ₜ[S] n := rfl
lemma projL_comp_act : (projL S M N).comp (actLmap S M N) = (projL S M N).comp (actRmap S M N) := by
  apply TensorProduct.ext'; intro m x
  induction x with
  | zero => rw [tmul_zero, map_zero, map_zero]
  | tmul s n =>
    show projL S M N (actLmap S M N (m ⊗ₜ (s ⊗ₜ n))) = projL S M N (actRmap S M N (m ⊗ₜ (s ⊗ₜ n)))
    rw [actLmap_tmul, actRmap_tmul, projL_tmul, projL_tmul, ← TensorProduct.smul_tmul', TensorProduct.tmul_smul]
  | add a b ha hb => rw [tmul_add, map_add, map_add, ha, hb]
noncomputable def aL : AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[ℤ] (S ⊗[ℤ] N)) ⟶ AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[ℤ] N) :=
  AddCommGrpCat.ofHom (actLmap S M N).toAddMonoidHom
noncomputable def aR : AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[ℤ] (S ⊗[ℤ] N)) ⟶ AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[ℤ] N) :=
  AddCommGrpCat.ofHom (actRmap S M N).toAddMonoidHom
noncomputable def piMor : AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[ℤ] N) ⟶ AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[S] N) :=
  AddCommGrpCat.ofHom (projL S M N).toAddMonoidHom
@[simp] lemma aL_apply (x) : (ConcreteCategory.hom (aL S M N)) x = actLmap S M N x := rfl
@[simp] lemma aR_apply (x) : (ConcreteCategory.hom (aR S M N)) x = actRmap S M N x := rfl
@[simp] lemma piMor_apply (x) : (ConcreteCategory.hom (piMor S M N)) x = projL S M N x := rfl
lemma coeq_condition : aL S M N ≫ piMor S M N = aR S M N ≫ piMor S M N := by
  ext x; exact LinearMap.congr_fun (projL_comp_act S M N) x
noncomputable def cofork : Limits.Cofork (aL S M N) (aR S M N) :=
  Limits.Cofork.ofπ (piMor S M N) (coeq_condition S M N)
noncomputable def descHom (s : Limits.Cofork (aL S M N) (aR S M N)) : (M ⊗[S] N) →+ s.pt :=
  TensorProduct.liftAddHom
    { toFun := fun m =>
        { toFun := fun n => (ConcreteCategory.hom s.π) (m ⊗ₜ[ℤ] n)
          map_zero' := by rw [tmul_zero, map_zero]
          map_add' := fun n1 n2 => by rw [tmul_add, map_add] }
      map_zero' := by ext n; simp [zero_tmul]
      map_add' := fun m1 m2 => by ext n; simp [add_tmul] }
    (fun a m n => by
      simp only [AddMonoidHom.coe_mk, ZeroHom.coe_mk]
      have key := congrArg (fun φ => (ConcreteCategory.hom φ) (m ⊗ₜ[ℤ] (a ⊗ₜ[ℤ] n))) s.condition
      simpa using key)
@[simp] lemma descHom_tmul (s : Limits.Cofork (aL S M N) (aR S M N)) (m : M) (n : N) :
    descHom S M N s (m ⊗ₜ[S] n) = (ConcreteCategory.hom s.π) (m ⊗ₜ[ℤ] n) := rfl
noncomputable def isColimitCofork : Limits.IsColimit (cofork S M N) :=
  Limits.Cofork.IsColimit.mk _
    (fun s => AddCommGrpCat.ofHom (descHom S M N s))
    (fun s => by
      ext x
      induction x using TensorProduct.induction_on with
      | zero => simp
      | tmul m n => simp [cofork]
      | add a b ha hb => simp only [map_add, ha, hb])
    (fun s f hf => by
      ext x
      induction x using TensorProduct.induction_on with
      | zero => simp
      | tmul m n =>
        have hfx := congrArg (fun φ => (ConcreteCategory.hom φ) (m ⊗ₜ[ℤ] n)) hf
        simp only [cofork] at hfx ⊢
        simpa using hfx
      | add a b ha hb => simp only [map_add, ha, hb])
#print axioms isColimitCofork

import Mathlib.LinearAlgebra.TensorProduct.Map
import Mathlib.LinearAlgebra.TensorProduct.Associator
import Mathlib.Algebra.Category.ModuleCat.Presheaf.Sheafification
import Mathlib.CategoryTheory.Limits.Shapes.Equalizers
open TensorProduct CategoryTheory Limits
variable (S : Type) [CommRing S] (M N : Type)

  TensorProduct.lift (LinearMap.mk₂ ℤ (fun s n => s • n)

    (fun m1 m2 s => smul_add s m1 m2) (fun c m s => smul_comm s c m)
    (fun m s1 s2 => add_smul s1 s2 m) (fun c m s => smul_assoc c s m))

  (TensorProduct.map (actM S M) LinearMap.id).comp (TensorProduct.assoc ℤ M S N).symm.toLinearMap
@[simp] lemma actRmap_tmul (m : M) (s : S) (n : N) : actRmap S M N (m ⊗ₜ (s ⊗ₜ n)) = m ⊗ₜ (s • n) := rfl
@[simp] lemma actLmap_tmul (m : M) (s : S) (n : N) : actLmap S M N (m ⊗ₜ (s ⊗ₜ n)) = (s • m) ⊗ₜ n := rfl
noncomputable def projL : (M ⊗[ℤ] N) →ₗ[ℤ] (M ⊗[S] N) :=
  (TensorProduct.liftAddHom
    { toFun := fun m => (LinearMap.toAddMonoidHom (((TensorProduct.mk S M N) m).restrictScalars ℤ))
      map_zero' := by ext n; simp
      map_add' := fun m1 m2 => by ext n; simp [TensorProduct.add_tmul] }
    (fun r m n => by simp [TensorProduct.smul_tmul])).toIntLinearMap
@[simp] lemma projL_tmul (m : M) (n : N) : projL S M N (m ⊗ₜ n) = m ⊗ₜ[S] n := rfl
lemma projL_comp_act : (projL S M N).comp (actLmap S M N) = (projL S M N).comp (actRmap S M N) := by
  apply TensorProduct.ext'; intro m x
  induction x with
  | zero => rw [tmul_zero, map_zero, map_zero]
  | tmul s n =>
    change projL S M N (actLmap S M N (m ⊗ₜ (s ⊗ₜ n))) = projL S M N (actRmap S M N (m ⊗ₜ (s ⊗ₜ n)))
    rw [actLmap_tmul, actRmap_tmul, projL_tmul, projL_tmul, ← TensorProduct.smul_tmul', TensorProduct.tmul_smul]
  | add a b ha hb => rw [tmul_add, map_add, map_add, ha, hb]
noncomputable def aL : AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[ℤ] (S ⊗[ℤ] N)) ⟶ AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[ℤ] N) :=
  AddCommGrpCat.ofHom (actLmap S M N).toAddMonoidHom
noncomputable def aR : AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[ℤ] (S ⊗[ℤ] N)) ⟶ AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[ℤ] N) :=
  AddCommGrpCat.ofHom (actRmap S M N).toAddMonoidHom
noncomputable def piMor : AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[ℤ] N) ⟶ AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[S] N) :=
  AddCommGrpCat.ofHom (projL S M N).toAddMonoidHom
@[simp] lemma piMor_apply (x) : (ConcreteCategory.hom (piMor S M N)) x = projL S M N x := rfl
lemma coeq_condition : aL S M N ≫ piMor S M N = aR S M N ≫ piMor S M N := by
  ext x; exact LinearMap.congr_fun (projL_comp_act S M N) x
noncomputable def cofork : Limits.Cofork (aL S M N) (aR S M N) :=
  Limits.Cofork.ofπ (piMor S M N) (coeq_condition S M N)
noncomputable def descHom (s : Limits.Cofork (aL S M N) (aR S M N)) : (M ⊗[S] N) →+ s.pt :=
  TensorProduct.liftAddHom
    { toFun := fun m =>
        { toFun := fun n => (ConcreteCategory.hom s.π) (m ⊗ₜ[ℤ] n)
          map_zero' := by rw [tmul_zero, map_zero]
          map_add' := fun n1 n2 => by rw [tmul_add, map_add] }
      map_zero' := by ext n; simp [zero_tmul]
      map_add' := fun m1 m2 => by ext n; simp [add_tmul] }
    (fun a m n => by
      simp only [AddMonoidHom.coe_mk, ZeroHom.coe_mk]
      have key := congrArg (fun φ => (ConcreteCategory.hom φ) (m ⊗ₜ[ℤ] (a ⊗ₜ[ℤ] n))) s.condition
      simpa using key)
@[simp] lemma descHom_tmul (s : Limits.Cofork (aL S M N) (aR S M N)) (m : M) (n : N) :
    descHom S M N s (m ⊗ₜ[S] n) = (ConcreteCategory.hom s.π) (m ⊗ₜ[ℤ] n) := rfl
noncomputable def isColimitCofork : Limits.IsColimit (cofork S M N) :=
  Limits.Cofork.IsColimit.mk _
    (fun s => AddCommGrpCat.ofHom (descHom S M N s))
    (fun s => by
      ext x
      induction x using TensorProduct.induction_on with
      | zero => rw [map_zero, map_zero]
      | tmul m n =>
        show descHom S M N s (projL S M N (m ⊗ₜ[ℤ] n)) = (ConcreteCategory.hom s.π) (m ⊗ₜ[ℤ] n)
        rw [projL_tmul, descHom_tmul]
      | add a b ha hb => rw [map_add, map_add]; exact congrArg₂ (· + ·) ha hb)
    (fun s f hf => by
      ext x
      induction x using TensorProduct.induction_on with
      | zero => rw [map_zero, map_zero]
      | tmul m n =>
        have key := congrArg (fun φ => (ConcreteCategory.hom φ) (m ⊗ₜ[ℤ] n)) hf
        simp only [comp_apply, piMor_apply, projL_tmul] at key
        show (ConcreteCategory.hom f) (m ⊗ₜ[S] n) = descHom S M N s (m ⊗ₜ[S] n)
        rw [descHom_tmul]; exact key
      | add a b ha hb => rw [map_add, map_add]; exact congrArg₂ (· + ·) ha hb)
#print axioms isColimitCofork

open TensorProduct CategoryTheory Limits
variable (S : Type) [CommRing S] (M N : Type)
  [AddCommGroup M] [Module S M] [AddCommGroup N] [Module S N]
noncomputable def actN : (S ⊗[ℤ] N) →ₗ[ℤ] N :=
  TensorProduct.lift (LinearMap.mk₂ ℤ (fun s n => s • n)
    (fun s1 s2 n => add_smul s1 s2 n) (fun c s n => smul_assoc c s n)
    (fun s n1 n2 => smul_add s n1 n2) (fun c s n => smul_comm s c n))
noncomputable def actM : (M ⊗[ℤ] S) →ₗ[ℤ] M :=
  TensorProduct.lift (LinearMap.mk₂ ℤ (fun m s => s • m)
    (fun m1 m2 s => smul_add s m1 m2) (fun c m s => smul_comm s c m)
    (fun m s1 s2 => add_smul s1 s2 m) (fun c m s => smul_assoc c s m))
noncomputable def actRmap : (M ⊗[ℤ] (S ⊗[ℤ] N)) →ₗ[ℤ] (M ⊗[ℤ] N) := TensorProduct.map LinearMap.id (actN S N)

      map_zero' := by ext n; simp
      map_add' := fun m1 m2 => by ext n; simp [TensorProduct.add_tmul] }
    (fun r m n => by simp [TensorProduct.smul_tmul])).toIntLinearMap
@[simp] lemma projL_tmul (m : M) (n : N) : projL S M N (m ⊗ₜ n) = m ⊗ₜ[S] n := rfl
lemma projL_comp_act : (projL S M N).comp (actLmap S M N) = (projL S M N).comp (actRmap S M N) := by
  apply TensorProduct.ext'; intro m x
  induction x with

  | tmul s n =>
    change projL S M N (actLmap S M N (m ⊗ₜ (s ⊗ₜ n))) = projL S M N (actRmap S M N (m ⊗ₜ (s ⊗ₜ n)))
    rw [actLmap_tmul, actRmap_tmul, projL_tmul, projL_tmul, ← TensorProduct.smul_tmul', TensorProduct.tmul_smul]
  | add a b ha hb => rw [tmul_add, map_add, map_add, ha, hb]
noncomputable def aL : AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[ℤ] (S ⊗[ℤ] N)) ⟶ AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[ℤ] N) :=
  AddCommGrpCat.ofHom (actLmap S M N).toAddMonoidHom
noncomputable def aR : AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[ℤ] (S ⊗[ℤ] N)) ⟶ AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[ℤ] N) :=
  AddCommGrpCat.ofHom (actRmap S M N).toAddMonoidHom

    (fun s f hf => by
      ext x
      induction x using TensorProduct.induction_on with
      | zero => rw [map_zero, map_zero]
      | tmul m n =>
        have key := congrArg (fun φ => (ConcreteCategory.hom φ) (m ⊗ₜ[ℤ] n)) hf
        simp only [comp_apply] at key
        show (ConcreteCategory.hom f) (m ⊗ₜ[S] n) = descHom S M N s (m ⊗ₜ[S] n)
        rw [descHom_tmul]; rw [← key]; rfl
      | add a b ha hb => rw [map_add, map_add]; exact congrArg₂ (· + ·) ha hb)
#print axioms isColimitCofork

noncomputable def projL : (M ⊗[ℤ] N) →ₗ[ℤ] (M ⊗[S] N) :=
  (TensorProduct.liftAddHom
    { toFun := fun m => (LinearMap.toAddMonoidHom (((TensorProduct.mk S M N) m).restrictScalars ℤ))
      map_zero' := by ext n; simp
      map_add' := fun m1 m2 => by ext n; simp [TensorProduct.add_tmul] }
    (fun r m n => by simp [TensorProduct.smul_tmul])).toIntLinearMap
@[simp] lemma projL_tmul (m : M) (n : N) : projL S M N (m ⊗ₜ n) = m ⊗ₜ[S] n := rfl
lemma projL_comp_act : (projL S M N).comp (actLmap S M N) = (projL S M N).comp (actRmap S M N) := by
  apply TensorProduct.ext'; intro m x
  induction x with
  | zero => rw [tmul_zero, map_zero, map_zero]
  | tmul s n =>
    change projL S M N (actLmap S M N (m ⊗ₜ (s ⊗ₜ n))) = projL S M N (actRmap S M N (m ⊗ₜ (s ⊗ₜ n)))
    rw [actLmap_tmul, actRmap_tmul, projL_tmul, projL_tmul, ← TensorProduct.smul_tmul', TensorProduct.tmul_smul]
  | add a b ha hb => rw [tmul_add, map_add, map_add, ha, hb]
noncomputable def aL : AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[ℤ] (S ⊗[ℤ] N)) ⟶ AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[ℤ] N) :=
  AddCommGrpCat.ofHom (actLmap S M N).toAddMonoidHom
noncomputable def aR : AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[ℤ] (S ⊗[ℤ] N)) ⟶ AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[ℤ] N) :=
  AddCommGrpCat.ofHom (actRmap S M N).toAddMonoidHom
noncomputable def piMor : AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[ℤ] N) ⟶ AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[S] N) :=
  AddCommGrpCat.ofHom (projL S M N).toAddMonoidHom
@[simp] lemma piMor_apply (x) : (ConcreteCategory.hom (piMor S M N)) x = projL S M N x := rfl
lemma coeq_condition : aL S M N ≫ piMor S M N = aR S M N ≫ piMor S M N := by
  ext x; exact LinearMap.congr_fun (projL_comp_act S M N) x
noncomputable def cofork : Limits.Cofork (aL S M N) (aR S M N) :=
  Limits.Cofork.ofπ (piMor S M N) (coeq_condition S M N)
noncomputable def descHom (s : Limits.Cofork (aL S M N) (aR S M N)) : (M ⊗[S] N) →+ s.pt :=
  TensorProduct.liftAddHom
    { toFun := fun m =>
        { toFun := fun n => (ConcreteCategory.hom s.π) (m ⊗ₜ[ℤ] n)
          map_zero' := by rw [tmul_zero, map_zero]
          map_add' := fun n1 n2 => by rw [tmul_add, map_add] }
      map_zero' := by ext n; simp [zero_tmul]
      map_add' := fun m1 m2 => by ext n; simp [add_tmul] }
    (fun a m n => by
      simp only [AddMonoidHom.coe_mk, ZeroHom.coe_mk]
      have key := congrArg (fun φ => (ConcreteCategory.hom φ) (m ⊗ₜ[ℤ] (a ⊗ₜ[ℤ] n))) s.condition
      simpa using key)
@[simp] lemma descHom_tmul (s : Limits.Cofork (aL S M N) (aR S M N)) (m : M) (n : N) :
    descHom S M N s (m ⊗ₜ[S] n) = (ConcreteCategory.hom s.π) (m ⊗ₜ[ℤ] n) := rfl
noncomputable def descMor (s : Limits.Cofork (aL S M N) (aR S M N)) : (cofork S M N).pt ⟶ s.pt :=
  AddCommGrpCat.ofHom (descHom S M N s)
noncomputable def isColimitCofork : Limits.IsColimit (cofork S M N) :=
  Limits.Cofork.IsColimit.mk _ (descMor S M N)
    (fun s => by
      ext x
      induction x using TensorProduct.induction_on with
      | zero => simp
      | tmul m n =>
        show descHom S M N s (projL S M N (m ⊗ₜ[ℤ] n)) = (ConcreteCategory.hom s.π) (m ⊗ₜ[ℤ] n)
        rw [projL_tmul, descHom_tmul]
      | add a b ha hb => simp only [map_add, ha, hb])
    (fun s f hf => by
      ext x
      induction x using TensorProduct.induction_on with
      | zero => simp
      | tmul m n =>
        have key := congrArg (fun φ => (ConcreteCategory.hom φ) (m ⊗ₜ[ℤ] n)) hf
        simp only [comp_apply] at key
        show (ConcreteCategory.hom f) (m ⊗ₜ[S] n) = descHom S M N s (m ⊗ₜ[S] n)
        rw [descHom_tmul, ← key]; rfl
      | add a b ha hb => simp only [map_add, ha, hb])
#print axioms isColimitCofork

import Mathlib.LinearAlgebra.TensorProduct.Map
import Mathlib.LinearAlgebra.TensorProduct.Associator
import Mathlib.Algebra.Category.ModuleCat.Presheaf.Sheafification
import Mathlib.CategoryTheory.Limits.Shapes.Equalizers
open TensorProduct CategoryTheory Limits
variable (S : Type) [CommRing S] (M N : Type)
  [AddCommGroup M] [Module S M] [AddCommGroup N] [Module S N]
noncomputable def actN : (S ⊗[ℤ] N) →ₗ[ℤ] N := TensorProduct.lift (LinearMap.mk₂ ℤ (fun s n => s • n)
    (fun s1 s2 n => add_smul s1 s2 n) (fun c s n => smul_assoc c s n)
    (fun s n1 n2 => smul_add s n1 n2) (fun c s n => smul_comm s c n))
noncomputable def actM : (M ⊗[ℤ] S) →ₗ[ℤ] M := TensorProduct.lift (LinearMap.mk₂ ℤ (fun m s => s • m)
    (fun m1 m2 s => smul_add s m1 m2) (fun c m s => smul_comm s c m)
    (fun m s1 s2 => add_smul s1 s2 m) (fun c m s => smul_assoc c s m))
noncomputable def actRmap : (M ⊗[ℤ] (S ⊗[ℤ] N)) →ₗ[ℤ] (M ⊗[ℤ] N) := TensorProduct.map LinearMap.id (actN S N)
noncomputable def actLmap : (M ⊗[ℤ] (S ⊗[ℤ] N)) →ₗ[ℤ] (M ⊗[ℤ] N) :=
  (TensorProduct.map (actM S M) LinearMap.id).comp (TensorProduct.assoc ℤ M S N).symm.toLinearMap
@[simp] lemma actRmap_tmul (m : M) (s : S) (n : N) : actRmap S M N (m ⊗ₜ (s ⊗ₜ n)) = m ⊗ₜ (s • n) := rfl
@[simp] lemma actLmap_tmul (m : M) (s : S) (n : N) : actLmap S M N (m ⊗ₜ (s ⊗ₜ n)) = (s • m) ⊗ₜ n := rfl
noncomputable def projL : (M ⊗[ℤ] N) →ₗ[ℤ] (M ⊗[S] N) :=
  (TensorProduct.liftAddHom { toFun := fun m => (LinearMap.toAddMonoidHom (((TensorProduct.mk S M N) m).restrictScalars ℤ))
      map_zero' := by ext n; simp
      map_add' := fun m1 m2 => by ext n; simp [TensorProduct.add_tmul] }
    (fun r m n => by simp [TensorProduct.smul_tmul])).toIntLinearMap
@[simp] lemma projL_tmul (m : M) (n : N) : projL S M N (m ⊗ₜ n) = m ⊗ₜ[S] n := rfl
lemma projL_surjective : Function.Surjective (projL S M N) := by
  intro y
  induction y using TensorProduct.induction_on with
  | zero => exact ⟨0, map_zero _⟩
  | tmul m n => exact ⟨m ⊗ₜ[ℤ] n, projL_tmul S M N m n⟩
  | add a b ha hb => obtain ⟨pa, rfl⟩ := ha; obtain ⟨pb, rfl⟩ := hb; exact ⟨pa + pb, map_add _ _ _⟩
lemma projL_comp_act : (projL S M N).comp (actLmap S M N) = (projL S M N).comp (actRmap S M N) := by
  apply TensorProduct.ext'; intro m x
  induction x with
  | zero => rw [tmul_zero, map_zero, map_zero]
  | tmul s n =>
    change projL S M N (actLmap S M N (m ⊗ₜ (s ⊗ₜ n))) = projL S M N (actRmap S M N (m ⊗ₜ (s ⊗ₜ n)))
    rw [actLmap_tmul, actRmap_tmul, projL_tmul, projL_tmul, ← TensorProduct.smul_tmul', TensorProduct.tmul_smul]
  | add a b ha hb => rw [tmul_add, map_add, map_add, ha, hb]
noncomputable def aL : AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[ℤ] (S ⊗[ℤ] N)) ⟶ AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[ℤ] N) :=
  AddCommGrpCat.ofHom (actLmap S M N).toAddMonoidHom
noncomputable def aR : AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[ℤ] (S ⊗[ℤ] N)) ⟶ AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[ℤ] N) :=
  AddCommGrpCat.ofHom (actRmap S M N).toAddMonoidHom
noncomputable def piMor : AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[ℤ] N) ⟶ AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[S] N) :=
  AddCommGrpCat.ofHom (projL S M N).toAddMonoidHom
@[simp] lemma piMor_apply (x) : (ConcreteCategory.hom (piMor S M N)) x = projL S M N x := rfl
instance piMor_epi : Epi (piMor S M N) := by
  rw [AddCommGrpCat.epi_iff_surjective]; exact projL_surjective S M N
lemma coeq_condition : aL S M N ≫ piMor S M N = aR S M N ≫ piMor S M N := by
  ext x; exact LinearMap.congr_fun (projL_comp_act S M N) x
noncomputable def cofork : Limits.Cofork (aL S M N) (aR S M N) :=
  Limits.Cofork.ofπ (piMor S M N) (coeq_condition S M N)
noncomputable def descHom (s : Limits.Cofork (aL S M N) (aR S M N)) : (M ⊗[S] N) →+ s.pt :=
  TensorProduct.liftAddHom
    { toFun := fun m => { toFun := fun n => (ConcreteCategory.hom s.π) (m ⊗ₜ[ℤ] n)
          map_zero' := by rw [tmul_zero, map_zero]
          map_add' := fun n1 n2 => by rw [tmul_add, map_add] }
      map_zero' := by ext n; simp [zero_tmul]
      map_add' := fun m1 m2 => by ext n; simp [add_tmul] }
    (fun a m n => by
      simp only [AddMonoidHom.coe_mk, ZeroHom.coe_mk]
      have key := congrArg (fun φ => (ConcreteCategory.hom φ) (m ⊗ₜ[ℤ] (a ⊗ₜ[ℤ] n))) s.condition
      simpa using key)
@[simp] lemma descHom_tmul (s : Limits.Cofork (aL S M N) (aR S M N)) (m : M) (n : N) :
    descHom S M N s (m ⊗ₜ[S] n) = (ConcreteCategory.hom s.π) (m ⊗ₜ[ℤ] n) := rfl
noncomputable def descMor (s : Limits.Cofork (aL S M N) (aR S M N)) : (cofork S M N).pt ⟶ s.pt :=
  AddCommGrpCat.ofHom (descHom S M N s)
lemma descFac (s : Limits.Cofork (aL S M N) (aR S M N)) :
    (cofork S M N).π ≫ descMor S M N s = s.π := by
  ext x
  induction x using TensorProduct.induction_on with
  | zero => simp
  | tmul m n =>
    show descHom S M N s (projL S M N (m ⊗ₜ[ℤ] n)) = (ConcreteCategory.hom s.π) (m ⊗ₜ[ℤ] n)
    rw [projL_tmul, descHom_tmul]
  | add a b ha hb => simp only [map_add, ha, hb]
noncomputable def isColimitCofork : Limits.IsColimit (cofork S M N) :=
  Limits.Cofork.IsColimit.mk _ (descMor S M N) (descFac S M N)
    (fun s f hf => (cancel_epi (cofork S M N).π).mp (hf.trans (descFac S M N s).symm))
#print axioms isColimitCofork

import Mathlib.LinearAlgebra.TensorProduct.Map
import Mathlib.LinearAlgebra.TensorProduct.Associator
import Mathlib.Algebra.Category.ModuleCat.Presheaf.Sheafification
import Mathlib.CategoryTheory.Limits.Shapes.Equalizers
open TensorProduct CategoryTheory Limits
variable (S : Type) [CommRing S] (M N : Type)
  [AddCommGroup M] [Module S M] [AddCommGroup N] [Module S N]
noncomputable def actN : (S ⊗[ℤ] N) →ₗ[ℤ] N :=
  TensorProduct.lift (LinearMap.mk₂ ℤ (fun s n => s • n)
    (fun s1 s2 n => add_smul s1 s2 n) (fun c s n => smul_assoc c s n)
    (fun s n1 n2 => smul_add s n1 n2) (fun c s n => smul_comm s c n))
noncomputable def actM : (M ⊗[ℤ] S) →ₗ[ℤ] M :=
  TensorProduct.lift (LinearMap.mk₂ ℤ (fun m s => s • m)
    (fun m1 m2 s => smul_add s m1 m2) (fun c m s => smul_comm s c m)
    (fun m s1 s2 => add_smul s1 s2 m) (fun c m s => smul_assoc c s m))
noncomputable def actRmap : (M ⊗[ℤ] (S ⊗[ℤ] N)) →ₗ[ℤ] (M ⊗[ℤ] N) :=
  TensorProduct.map LinearMap.id (actN S N)
noncomputable def actLmap : (M ⊗[ℤ] (S ⊗[ℤ] N)) →ₗ[ℤ] (M ⊗[ℤ] N) :=
  (TensorProduct.map (actM S M) LinearMap.id).comp (TensorProduct.assoc ℤ M S N).symm.toLinearMap
@[simp] lemma actRmap_tmul (m : M) (s : S) (n : N) : actRmap S M N (m ⊗ₜ (s ⊗ₜ n)) = m ⊗ₜ (s • n) := rfl
@[simp] lemma actLmap_tmul (m : M) (s : S) (n : N) : actLmap S M N (m ⊗ₜ (s ⊗ₜ n)) = (s • m) ⊗ₜ n := rfl
noncomputable def projL : (M ⊗[ℤ] N) →ₗ[ℤ] (M ⊗[S] N) :=
  (TensorProduct.liftAddHom
    { toFun := fun m => (LinearMap.toAddMonoidHom (((TensorProduct.mk S M N) m).restrictScalars ℤ))
      map_zero' := by ext n; simp
      map_add' := fun m1 m2 => by ext n; simp [TensorProduct.add_tmul] }
    (fun r m n => by simp [TensorProduct.smul_tmul])).toIntLinearMap
@[simp] lemma projL_tmul (m : M) (n : N) : projL S M N (m ⊗ₜ n) = m ⊗ₜ[S] n := rfl
lemma projL_surjective : Function.Surjective (projL S M N) := by
  intro y
  induction y using TensorProduct.induction_on with
  | zero => exact ⟨0, map_zero _⟩
  | tmul m n => exact ⟨m ⊗ₜ[ℤ] n, projL_tmul S M N m n⟩
  | add a b ha hb => obtain ⟨pa, rfl⟩ := ha; obtain ⟨pb, rfl⟩ := hb; exact ⟨pa + pb, map_add _ _ _⟩
lemma projL_comp_act : (projL S M N).comp (actLmap S M N) = (projL S M N).comp (actRmap S M N) := by
  apply TensorProduct.ext'; intro m x
  induction x with
  | zero => rw [tmul_zero, map_zero, map_zero]
  | tmul s n =>
    change projL S M N (actLmap S M N (m ⊗ₜ (s ⊗ₜ n))) = projL S M N (actRmap S M N (m ⊗ₜ (s ⊗ₜ n)))
    rw [actLmap_tmul, actRmap_tmul, projL_tmul, projL_tmul, ← TensorProduct.smul_tmul',
      TensorProduct.tmul_smul]
  | add a b ha hb => rw [tmul_add, map_add, map_add, ha, hb]
noncomputable def aL : AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[ℤ] (S ⊗[ℤ] N)) ⟶ AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[ℤ] N) :=
  AddCommGrpCat.ofHom (actLmap S M N).toAddMonoidHom
noncomputable def aR : AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[ℤ] (S ⊗[ℤ] N)) ⟶ AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[ℤ] N) :=
  AddCommGrpCat.ofHom (actRmap S M N).toAddMonoidHom
noncomputable def piMor : AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[ℤ] N) ⟶ AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[S] N) :=
  AddCommGrpCat.ofHom (projL S M N).toAddMonoidHom
@[simp] lemma piMor_apply (x) : (ConcreteCategory.hom (piMor S M N)) x = projL S M N x := rfl
instance piMor_epi : Epi (piMor S M N) :=
  ConcreteCategory.epi_of_surjective (piMor S M N) (projL_surjective S M N)
lemma coeq_condition : aL S M N ≫ piMor S M N = aR S M N ≫ piMor S M N := by
  ext x; exact LinearMap.congr_fun (projL_comp_act S M N) x
noncomputable def cofork : Limits.Cofork (aL S M N) (aR S M N) :=
  Limits.Cofork.ofπ (piMor S M N) (coeq_condition S M N)
noncomputable def descHom (s : Limits.Cofork (aL S M N) (aR S M N)) : (M ⊗[S] N) →+ s.pt :=
  TensorProduct.liftAddHom
    { toFun := fun m =>
        { toFun := fun n => (ConcreteCategory.hom s.π) (m ⊗ₜ[ℤ] n)
          map_zero' := by rw [tmul_zero, map_zero]
          map_add' := fun n1 n2 => by rw [tmul_add, map_add] }
      map_zero' := by ext n; simp [zero_tmul]
      map_add' := fun m1 m2 => by ext n; simp [add_tmul] }
    (fun a m n => by
      simp only [AddMonoidHom.coe_mk, ZeroHom.coe_mk]
      have key := congrArg (fun φ => (ConcreteCategory.hom φ) (m ⊗ₜ[ℤ] (a ⊗ₜ[ℤ] n))) s.condition
      simpa using key)
@[simp] lemma descHom_tmul (s : Limits.Cofork (aL S M N) (aR S M N)) (m : M) (n : N) :
    descHom S M N s (m ⊗ₜ[S] n) = (ConcreteCategory.hom s.π) (m ⊗ₜ[ℤ] n) := rfl
noncomputable def descMor (s : Limits.Cofork (aL S M N) (aR S M N)) : (cofork S M N).pt ⟶ s.pt :=
  AddCommGrpCat.ofHom (descHom S M N s)
lemma descFac (s : Limits.Cofork (aL S M N) (aR S M N)) :
    (cofork S M N).π ≫ descMor S M N s = s.π := by
  ext x
  induction x using TensorProduct.induction_on with
  | zero => simp
  | tmul m n =>
    show descHom S M N s (projL S M N (m ⊗ₜ[ℤ] n)) = (ConcreteCategory.hom s.π) (m ⊗ₜ[ℤ] n)
    rw [projL_tmul, descHom_tmul]
  | add a b ha hb => simp only [map_add, ha, hb]
noncomputable def isColimitCofork : Limits.IsColimit (cofork S M N) :=
  Limits.Cofork.IsColimit.mk _ (descMor S M N) (descFac S M N)
    (fun s f hf => (cancel_epi (piMor S M N)).mp (hf.trans (descFac S M N s).symm))
#print axioms isColimitCofork

noncomputable def Dobj : AddCommGrpCat.{u} := AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[ℤ] (S ⊗[ℤ] N))

noncomputable def Bobj : AddCommGrpCat.{u} := AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[ℤ] N)
/-- The coequalizer apex `M ⊗[S] N`. -/
noncomputable def Tobj : AddCommGrpCat.{u} := AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[S] N)

/-- Left action map as a morphism of abelian groups. -/
noncomputable def aL : Dobj S M N ⟶ Bobj S M N := AddCommGrpCat.ofHom (actLmap S M N).toAddMonoidHom
/-- Right action map as a morphism of abelian groups. -/
noncomputable def aR : Dobj S M N ⟶ Bobj S M N := AddCommGrpCat.ofHom (actRmap S M N).toAddMonoidHom

/-- The projection `M ⊗[ℤ] N → M ⊗[S] N` is surjective (it is the canonical
quotient map onto the relative tensor). -/
lemma projL_surjective : Function.Surjective (projL S M N) := by
  intro y
  induction y using TensorProduct.induction_on with
  | zero => exact ⟨0, map_zero _⟩
  | tmul m n => exact ⟨m ⊗ₜ[ℤ] n, projL_tmul S M N m n⟩
  | add a b ha hb =>
    obtain ⟨pa, rfl⟩ := ha; obtain ⟨pb, rfl⟩ := hb; exact ⟨pa + pb, map_add _ _ _⟩

/-- The two action maps become equal after the projection: this is the cofork
coequalizing condition, established at the level of `ℤ`-linear maps. -/
lemma projL_comp_act :
    (projL S M N).comp (actLmap S M N) = (projL S M N).comp (actRmap S M N) := by
  apply TensorProduct.ext'; intro m x
  induction x with
  | zero => rw [tmul_zero, map_zero, map_zero]
  | tmul s n =>
    change projL S M N (actLmap S M N (m ⊗ₜ (s ⊗ₜ n)))
      = projL S M N (actRmap S M N (m ⊗ₜ (s ⊗ₜ n)))
    rw [actLmap_tmul, actRmap_tmul, projL_tmul, projL_tmul, ← TensorProduct.smul_tmul',
      TensorProduct.tmul_smul]
  | add a b ha hb => rw [tmul_add, map_add, map_add, ha, hb]

/-- Left action map as a morphism of abelian groups. -/
noncomputable def aL :
    AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[ℤ] (S ⊗[ℤ] N)) ⟶ AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[ℤ] N) :=
  AddCommGrpCat.ofHom (actLmap S M N).toAddMonoidHom
/-- Right action map as a morphism of abelian groups. -/
noncomputable def aR :
    AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[ℤ] (S ⊗[ℤ] N)) ⟶ AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[ℤ] N) :=
  AddCommGrpCat.ofHom (actRmap S M N).toAddMonoidHom
/-- The projection as a morphism of abelian groups. -/
noncomputable def piMor :
    AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[ℤ] N) ⟶ AddCommGrpCat.of (M ⊗[S] N) :=
  AddCommGrpCat.ofHom (projL S M N).toAddMonoidHom

@[simp] lemma piMor_apply (x) : (ConcreteCategory.hom (piMor S M N)) x = projL S M N x := rfl

instance piMor_epi : Epi (piMor S M N) :=
  ConcreteCategory.epi_of_surjective (piMor S M N) (projL_surjective S M N)

/-- The projection coequalizes the two action maps (as morphisms of abelian groups). -/
lemma coeq_condition : aL S M N ≫ piMor S M N = aR S M N ≫ piMor S M N := by

/-- The cofork `M ⊗[ℤ] (S ⊗[ℤ] N) ⇉ M ⊗[ℤ] N → M ⊗[S] N` of abelian groups. -/
noncomputable def cofork : Limits.Cofork (aL S M N) (aR S M N) :=
  Limits.Cofork.ofπ (piMor S M N) (coeq_condition S M N)

      simp only [AddMonoidHom.coe_mk, ZeroHom.coe_mk]
      have key :=
        congrArg (fun φ => (ConcreteCategory.hom φ) (m ⊗ₜ[ℤ] (a ⊗ₜ[ℤ] n))) s.condition
      simpa using key)

@[simp] lemma descHom_tmul (s : Limits.Cofork (aL S M N) (aR S M N)) (m : M) (n : N) :
    descHom S M N s (m ⊗ₜ[S] n) = (ConcreteCategory.hom s.π) (m ⊗ₜ[ℤ] n) := rfl

/-- The descent map as a morphism of abelian groups out of the cofork apex. -/
noncomputable def descMor (s : Limits.Cofork (aL S M N) (aR S M N)) :
    (cofork S M N).pt ⟶ s.pt :=
  AddCommGrpCat.ofHom (descHom S M N s)

/-- The descent map factors the cofork's projection: `π ≫ descMor s = s.π`. -/
lemma descFac (s : Limits.Cofork (aL S M N) (aR S M N)) :
    (cofork S M N).π ≫ descMor S M N s = s.π := by
  ext x
  induction x using TensorProduct.induction_on with
  | zero => simp
  | tmul m n =>
    change descHom S M N s (projL S M N (m ⊗ₜ[ℤ] n)) = (ConcreteCategory.hom s.π) (m ⊗ₜ[ℤ] n)
    rw [projL_tmul, descHom_tmul]
  | add a b ha hb => simp only [map_add, ha, hb]

/-- **`M ⊗[S] N` is the coequalizer**, in the category of abelian groups, of the two
`S`-action maps `M ⊗[ℤ] (S ⊗[ℤ] N) ⇉ M ⊗[ℤ] N`.  This is the objectwise content of
`lem:relativeTensor_as_coequalizer`; uniqueness uses that the projection `piMor` is an
epimorphism.  Axiom-clean. -/
noncomputable def isColimitCofork : Limits.IsColimit (cofork S M N) :=
  Limits.Cofork.IsColimit.mk _ (descMor S M N) (descFac S M N)
    (fun s _ hf => (cancel_epi (piMor S M N)).mp (hf.trans (descFac S M N s).symm))

# AlgebraicJacobian/Picard/SectionGradedRing.lean

## Summary
- **Declarations added (22, all axiom-clean):** in new `namespace
  AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.RelativeTensorCoequalizer` —
  `actN`, `actM`, `actRmap`, `actLmap`, `actRmap_tmul`, `actLmap_tmul`, `projL`,
  `projL_tmul`, `projL_surjective`, `projL_comp_act`, `aL`, `aR`, `piMor`,
  `piMor_apply`, `piMor_epi` (instance), `coeq_condition`, `cofork`, `descHom`,
  `descHom_tmul`, `descMor`, `descFac`, `isColimitCofork`.
- **Declarations blocked (0 added with sorry).** The presheaf-level
  `relativeTensorCoequalizerIso` and the crux `isIso_sheafification_whiskerRight_unit`
  remain ABSENT (not built this iter) — they need the presheaf-promotion machinery
  (see handoff). No speculative scaffolding added.
- **Sorry count:** 0 → 0 (the file was and remains 0-sorry; the lone `grep` hit is the
  word "sorry" inside a docstring/comment).
- **Build:** `lake build AlgebraicJacobian.Picard.SectionGradedRing` → **success**
  (only style/lint warnings: long lines, unused section vars on the rfl `@[simp]`
  lemmas). `#print axioms isColimitCofork = [propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]`.
- New imports added to the file: `Mathlib.Algebra.Category.Grp.Basic`,
  `Mathlib.LinearAlgebra.TensorProduct.Map`,
  `Mathlib.LinearAlgebra.TensorProduct.Associator`,
  `Mathlib.CategoryTheory.Limits.Shapes.Equalizers`.

## What was built: the OBJECTWISE relative-tensor coequalizer (RESOLVED, axiom-clean)
**Goal of the SNAP lane** (PROGRESS objective 3): build the coequalizer brick
`relativeTensorCoequalizerIso` (`lem:relativeTensor_as_coequalizer`) to discharge the
crux `isIso_sheafification_whiskerRight_unit`, then ride `tensorObjAssoc`/`tensorPowAdd`.

**Approach (snap-route Analogue 1, lowest-absent-infra route):** the underlying abelian
group of the relative tensor `M ⊗[S] N` is the coequalizer of the two `S`-action maps
`M ⊗[ℤ] (S ⊗[ℤ] N) ⇉ M ⊗[ℤ] N`. The **objectwise** statement (single commutative ring
`S`, single pair of `S`-modules) is the genuine Mathlib-absent mathematical core, and it
is now BUILT in `AddCommGrpCat`:
- The abelian universal property is exactly `TensorProduct.liftAddHom`
  (`f : M →+ N →+ P`, `S`-balanced ⟹ `M ⊗[S] N →+ P`) — the key Mathlib lemma found this
  iter. (The analogist's claim "no tensor-as-coequalizer in Mathlib" is correct for the
  *categorical* statement, but `liftAddHom` IS the abelian universal property, so the
  coequalizer is constructible.)
- `actLmap`/`actRmap` built via `TensorProduct.map` + `TensorProduct.assoc`; the action
  bilinear maps via `LinearMap.mk₂` with `add_smul`/`smul_assoc`/`smul_add`/`smul_comm`
  (clean because `IsScalarTower ℤ S M` is canonical, so the `ℤ`-scalar conditions reduce
  to `smul_assoc`/`smul_comm`).
- `isColimitCofork : IsColimit (cofork ...)` via `Cofork.IsColimit.mk`: existence =
  `descHom` (`liftAddHom` of the cofork map, balancedness from `s.condition`), uniqueness
  = `cancel_epi` of `piMor` (which is `Epi` by `ConcreteCategory.epi_of_surjective` +
  `projL_surjective`).

**This is the foundational half of route (a).** It does NOT by itself close any project
sorry (the crux needs the presheaf promotion below), but it is the hardest concrete,
Mathlib-absent piece and is permanent, reusable infrastructure.

## What remains (NOT added; precise handoff): presheaf promotion + crux
The presheaf-level `relativeTensorCoequalizerIso` and the crux are a SEPARATE, large,
API-heavy build (realistically the next full session). Route, with verified API:
1. **Lift `isColimitCofork` to `Cᵒᵖ ⥤ AddCommGrpCat`** via
   `CategoryTheory.Limits.evaluationJointlyReflectsColimits` (VERIFIED present,
   `Mathlib.CategoryTheory.Limits.FunctorCategory.Basic`): colimits in the functor
   category are objectwise. Need the `actN`/`actM`/`projL` families as NATURAL
   transformations of `Cᵒᵖ ⥤ AddCommGrpCat` (naturality = restriction-compatibility of the
   module action — holds, but each needs a naturality proof). Lone risk: the `ℤ`-tensor
   presheaf `P ⊗_ℤ Q` in `Cᵒᵖ ⥤ Ab` — confirm which monoidal structure
   `GrothendieckTopology.W.monoidal` (`Sites/Monoidal.lean`) uses and that its objectwise
   value is `U ↦ P(U) ⊗_ℤ Q(U)`.
2. **Identify the apex** `U ↦ P(U) ⊗_{R₀(U)} Q(U)` with `(toPresheaf R₀).obj (P ⊗_p Q)`
   using `PresheafOfModules.Monoidal.tensorObj_obj` /`tensorObj_map_tmul` (VERIFIED:
   `tensorObj_obj : (tensorObj M₁ M₂).obj X = M₁.obj X ⊗ M₂.obj X`). Gives
   `relativeTensorCoequalizerIso`.
3. **Close the crux** `isIso_sheafification_whiskerRight_unit`: `toPresheaf.map (η_P ▷ Q)`
   = the induced map of coequalizers from whiskering the rows by `η_P ⊗_ℤ (-)`; abelian
   sheafification `a` (left adjoint) preserves the coequalizer; `GrothendieckTopology.W`
   inverts the `ℤ`-whiskered rows (`W.monoidal` + `η_P ∈ J.W` =
   `localIso_toPresheaf_map_unit`, already built); so the map ∈ `J.W` and
   `(isIso_sheafification_map_iff _).mpr` closes it. Then `tensorObjAssoc` (blueprint
   `cor:sheafTensorObjAssoc`) and `tensorPowAdd` ride on top, unblocking
   `sectionsMul_assoc_unit` and the graded-ring assembly.

The in-file deferred-handoff comment (end of file) records this in full, including the
do-not-pursue notes for routes (b) Day's-closed / (c) stalkwise.

## Needs blueprint entry
All 22 new declarations are infrastructure with no blueprint block (they are the
objectwise refinement of `lem:relativeTensor_as_coequalizer`, which is blueprinted only at
the presheaf level). The planner/reviewer should add blueprint nodes (e.g. a
`lem:relativeTensor_objectwise_coequalizer` sub-lemma under
`sec:sgr_tensor_powers`) covering:
- `RelativeTensorCoequalizer.isColimitCofork` (main): `M ⊗[S] N` is the `AddCommGrpCat`
  coequalizer of the two `S`-action maps; relies on `TensorProduct.liftAddHom`,
  `Cofork.IsColimit.mk`, `ConcreteCategory.epi_of_surjective`.
- supporting: `actN`, `actM`, `actLmap`, `actRmap`, `projL`, `projL_surjective`,
  `projL_comp_act`, `aL`, `aR`, `piMor`, `piMor_epi`, `cofork`, `descHom`, `descMor`,
  `descFac`.
These are currently `lean_aux` nodes invisible to the dependency graph
(`archon dag-query unmatched` will list them) until blueprinted.

## Why I stopped
**Partial progress.** Added 22 axiom-clean declarations forming the complete objectwise
relative-tensor coequalizer (`isColimitCofork`, file lines ~386–417, namespace
`RelativeTensorCoequalizer`). This is the deepest missing piece of route (a) and the
hardest concrete Mathlib-absent brick.

The next step — promoting the objectwise `IsColimit` to the presheaf category and closing
the crux — is a genuinely large, separate, naturality/functor-category-monoidal build
(several substeps, each with its own API surface and naturality obligations); it is not a
quick adjacent win and realistically does not fit alongside the objectwise build in one
session. I have specified it precisely (with verified API names:
`evaluationJointlyReflectsColimits`, `PresheafOfModules.Monoidal.tensorObj_obj`,
`GrothendieckTopology.W.monoidal`) rather than start it and leave it half-built.

No informal-agent key in env (documented in PROGRESS standing notes); used blueprint +
Mathlib search instead.

## Dead-end warnings for next iter
- Do NOT hand-build the `ℤ`-bilinear action maps with raw `LinearMap.mk₂` and `c • (s•m)`
  goals naively — the `ℤ`-scalar conditions need `smul_assoc`/`smul_comm` (via
  `IsScalarTower ℤ S M`), and the `lift`/`map`/`assoc` composition (as used here) is the
  clean route. The tmul compute-lemmas are all `rfl`.
- The category of abelian groups in this Mathlib pin is **`AddCommGrpCat`** (with `Ab` a
  reducible abbrev), NOT `AddCommGrp`. `toPresheaf` lands in `Cᵒᵖ ⥤ Ab`.
- For `AddCommGrpCat` morphism equalities reached by `ext x`, the goal coercion is
  `AddCommGrpCat.Hom.hom` (defeq to `ConcreteCategory.hom`, but `simp`/`rw [map_zero]`
  may not fire on it directly). Prefer the **epi-cancellation** route for uniqueness
  (`cancel_epi piMor`) over `ext`+`induction`, which hits coercion-normalization friction
  on the `zero`/`add` cases.
- Routes (b) `MonoidalClosed (PresheafOfModules R₀)` and (c) module-sheaf stalks remain
  ABSENT — do not pursue.
